title: Logistics Operations Executive
description:
Job Responsibilities:

  1. Provide Administrative Support to the Logistics Manager.
  2. Coordinate between Sales and Logistics for orders.
  3. Assign and allocate vehicles as per scheduled planning and route.
  4. Support Self-Collection Counter Operations.
  5. Act as the first point of contact handle urgent delivery issues, assist in resolving customer disputes, and support basic ERP system usage.
  6. Liaise with the Procurement to coordinate local collection from suppliers, ensuring timely pick-up and smooth communication with the logistics team and drivers.
  7. To perform any other ad hoc duties/ task assigned by Superior.


Job Qualifications:

Education Qualifications:

  • Min Nitec, Secondary School GCE “O” Level or SPM Level or relevant industry.
  • Diploma or higher qualifications will be an added advantage.


Experience Required:

  • Minimum 2 years of experience in logistics administration or a related field.

postedCompany.description:
About K.U.S Formwork and Scaffolding Pte Ltd

K.U.S Formwork and Scaffolding was founded in 2010 and became as part of the K.U.S Group of Companies. K.U.S Formwork and Scaffolding’s foothold was set in Southeast Asia to become one of the main Formwork & Scaffolding solutions and services providers for major residential, commercial, industrial, and infrastructures construction projects.


K.U.S has invested in extensive research and development of Formwork and Scaffolding systems to compete and remain relevant to new technologies and trends in the industry with a prime focus on Economics, Efficiency, Quality, and Safety. K.U.S then turned to be an integral solutions and service provider which can combine multiple system formwork & scaffolding within a project.


The company’s team of experts offers solutions and services through the entirety of the project: from tendering, design, on-site construction to post-project completion. Aside from supplying competitive and high-quality systems, solutions, and services to our customers, the company expanded the flexible business model through a rental and buyback program, easing the logistic and storage problems faced by many clients after the project completion.


K.U.S offers a wide range of system formwork consisting of Monolithic Aluminum formwork system, wall & column formwork, climbing formwork system, and slab formwork.


It also offers a variety of shoring and modular scaffolding systems such as Harc-60, Ringlock, cuplock, Kwikstage, and Aluminum tower scaffolding systems. Along with these, K.U.S has ventured into contracting works.
